title: Post-Production Audit Closure Gate Status
description: Records the post-production audit verdict and closure gate state. Used to enforce closure blocking rules.

gate_state.description: Gate status: OPEN (closure permitted), BLOCKED (closure prohibited), CONDITIONAL_PASS (closure permitted with conditions)

audit_slug.description: Unique identifier for this audit run (e.g., 'collector-2026-05-10')

verdict.description: Final audit verdict based on sampling and source-of-truth verification

blocking_reason.description: If gate_state=BLOCKED, explain the blocking reason (e.g., 'estimated defect rate 8% exceeds threshold 7%')

approver.description: Name or email of the person/agent approving closure (required if gate_state=CONDITIONAL_PASS or OPEN)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this gate status was recorded

remediation_due_at.description: If verdict=FAIL, the escalation SLA deadline for remediation completion

remediation_owner.description: If verdict=FAIL, the person/team assigned to remediation

confidence_interval_width.description: If verdict includes confidence bounds, the width of the confidence interval (e.g., 0.05 for ±5%)

sample_size.description: Number of records sampled for verification

total_population.description: Total population size from which sample was drawn
